videos.title: How to Build AI Agents with LangChain in 2024
videos.description: Step-by-step guide to building autonomous AI agents using LangChain and Python.
videos.transcript: Welcome to this tutorial on building AI agents. Today we cover LangChain tools, memory, and agent loops.

videos.title: Prompt Engineering Best Practices — Full Guide
videos.description: Master prompt engineering with these proven techniques for GPT-4 and Claude.
videos.transcript: Prompt engineering is the art of crafting inputs that get the best output from large language models.

videos.title: Claude vs GPT-4: Real Benchmarks Compared
videos.description: I ran 50 real-world tasks through both models. Here are the results.
videos.transcript: Let's compare Claude and GPT-4 on coding, writing, reasoning, and creativity tasks.

videos.title: RAG Systems Explained — Build One from Scratch
videos.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation from first principles, with a working demo.
videos.transcript: RAG combines a vector database with an LLM to answer questions from your own documents.

videos.title: Fine-Tuning vs Prompting: When to Use Each
videos.description: Should you fine-tune or just write better prompts? This video answers that.
videos.transcript: Fine-tuning and prompting both have their place. Here is how to decide which one to use.
